Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 40
DMG: 38 Dmg Bonus: 142
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.

Class: MNK
Race: ALL

« Previous 1 2 Next »
Post Comment
not a t staff but it will do
QuoteReply
# Aug 14 2003 at 12:30 AM Rating: Decent
acidic
8 posts
just got one of these on morell thule for 1500p not bad at all. replaced my carved velium brawl stick great weapon until i hit 50 then i hope to get a screamstaff or t staff.
▲ Page top
Awesome item
QuoteReply
# Dec 04 2002 at 5:28 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592256079685
8 posts
I just got this thing..and believe me, it's worth it. Bought for 6k in Bazaar, and so far have been doubling for 150 easily while soloing giants. Not too impressive I'm sure for higher levels, but for a 29 monk with 1hb at 150, that's the best damage I've yet see myself do. Combined with a FBSS or another 20%+ haste item, and this thing is still faster than most Warrior weapons.

I switched slots from using a Fist of Rock and Cane of Tranquil...where i was getting faster hits, but low damage..like 15-20 if i was lucky. IMHO, quadding for 20*4 and doubling for 75*2...i'll take the slightly slower speed for improved damage.

My2Cents
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 23 2003 at 3:01 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Yeah.. got mine one week ago on my now 25 monk. He is dubblin for 156 + tail rake 52... and that is a sweet sight endeed :)
price check on aisle 5 bob
QuoteReply

__DEL__1591774049094
10 posts

__DEL__1591778825662
Scholar
44 posts
Are you sure you're not thinking of a Runed Fighers Staff? It's 19/20 and it goes in the 35-40k range. Same ratio but hits twice as fast. 40k for this one is kinda high I think.
▲ Page top
Am I missing something ?
QuoteReply
# Jun 28 2002 at 10:38 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591778575233
11 posts
This item seems to sell for a great deal less than the classic T-staff (and before you tell me I know the T-staffhas a unresistable stun on it). But when you are looking at the two from an damage ratio point of view then at high levels its quite easy in a balanced group to achieve 100% haste most of the time. Thsi 100% haste would drop the T-staff to 29/15 weapon, very cool but the IFS would go all the way to a 39/20 with haste having a greater effect on a longer delay weapon. So in anutshell if you are packing uber haste wont this be a better general purpose weapon than the T-staff. I dont know just a thought.........
▲ Page top
RE: Am I missing something ?
QuoteReply
# Jan 12 2003 at 9:21 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592255770527
21 posts
my thoughts exactly...

#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 04 2002 at 9:10 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Selling one of these on Drinal for a lil while. Average server price is 20k, so thats what i selling for. Contact me or Ssok.
#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 02 2002 at 10:02 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I was EC whoring the other day, and i had 9800 platt so i figured i might as well try to get an IFS the average price on karana foor these is like 9-12 k and i bought some footpads of the tiger for 3.2k since they sell for like 4.5k average and i forgot to take off the WTB IFS message i had on my hotkey and someone asked me how much i was paying, and i only had like 6600 platt on me so i said 6k? and he said ok ill be willing to sell for that...i was thinking maybe he wasnt talking about IFS maybe he had SCH or something....i was trying to buy that too...so i got it for 6k he MUST have been a twink or something not knowing its price....im happy now but im dirt poor....

I used this in my 40's then sold it and went to 1hb's. I did good dmg with a jade mace and Ringed mace of ykesha, but i bought another IFS today because its alot more fun to crush with this monster than get a bunch of spam from weak 1hb hits.

Anyway its posted now on the item that the damage bonus is 14

Pike Razgule
50monk~veeshan
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Oct 15 2001 at 10:44 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) The damage bonus will only be listed if you can use the item. For example, if a druid looks for a damage bonus on a monk only item, none will be listed. Dmg bonus for a 40 dly weapon would be approx 10 pts starting at level 50 and would increase from there.
RE: dmg bonus
QuoteReply
# Jul 30 2002 at 9:19 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759278476
23 posts
Go pick up a weighted axe with a melee class. At around 35 or so monk, I that thing gives a 43 damage bonus... too bad its 150 delay lol. No, I'm NOT using it. If you sell it to a vendor, it doesn't even sell for 2 plat. Giants will drop it, but they never wield it.
▲ Page top
RE: dmg bonus
QuoteReply
# May 30 2002 at 4:53 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593965779047
Scholar
92 posts
Not exactly. DB displayed is what DB you would get if you eqipped the item, regardless of if you are allowed to equip it. Since no caster (int or wis based) gets DBs, it never displays one on any weapon.

DB is always dependent on the weilder (or holder if you can't weild it).
▲ Page top
RE: dmg bonus
QuoteReply
# Feb 07 2002 at 10:34 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591768010302
View User Forum
31 posts
Hmm, actually my bard can see damage bonuses on non-bard-usable weaps. But I don't recall my casters ever seeing a bonus. Perhaps only melees get the bonuses, thus only they get to see them? That's what I've heard people say, and it makes sense to me, but I'm not positive.
▲ Page top

# Aug 16 2001 at 11:36 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591754612786
10 posts
ok, the guy who said he was hitting for 400 is full of it. Wanna check real dmg, go to www.monkly-business.com, they have a dmg calculator. With this weapon, max dmg is placed at 212.66, with maxed 2h blunt skill (252) and max str (255). The guy hitting 223 was probably telling the truth, or at least he can lie with some intelligence.
